project: Colegio Técnico Romega - Institutional Website & CMS

theme_and_archetype.description: A clean, elegant, and academic design focusing on authority, clarity, and trust. The UI utilizes structured grids, generous spacing, and sober institutional colors (Blue, White, Gray).

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900

typography.guidelines: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans for headings. Use 'Outfit' for a modern academic feel. Maintain tight tracking on headings and loose leading on body text.

colors.guidelines: Strict adherence to sober institutional colors: Navy Blue, White, and Slate Grays. Avoid neon or pastel tones. Use high contrast for readability, meeting WCAG AA standards.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8, p-12, and p-16 for section padding to allow content to breathe.

grids.marketing: Use Bento Grids (MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID) for the 'Oferta Académica' and 'Noticias' sections to create visual interest. Asymmetrical spans (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4).
grids.dashboard: Use Control Room Grid (MODE B) for the CMS Admin Panel. Dense, cardless or 1px border panels with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).

components.cards: Subtle border (1px border-slate-200), flat background, no soft drop shadows. On hover, use a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.
components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism over the Hero section (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50), ensuring high contrast for navigation links.
components.footer: High contrast shift. Use very dark blue (bg-slate-950) with white text, py-20 padding, and large structural typography.

components_strategy.public_site: Use custom HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts (Hero, Bento Grid Offerings). No rigid Shadcn layout wrappers. Ensure overlapping and visual tension.
components_strategy.interactive_elements: Heavily customized Shadcn UI for forms, dialogues, and navigation. Forms must use Shadcn 'Input', 'Textarea', and 'Button'.
components_strategy.cms_dashboard: Rely entirely on Shadcn UI (Tables, Dialogs, Dropdowns, Tabs, Forms). Go for a 'cardless' crisp technical look (Grid Borders surface strategy). Sidebar navigation with clear state indications.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly change text and background color on hover. e.g., hover:bg-blue-800 hover:text-white.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Subtle entrance animations using Framer Motion (opacity and y-axis shift) for lists and grids. Do not over-animate. Ensure 'prefers-reduced-motion' compatibility.

hero_background.description: Large brick school building with a clock tower. Use with a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900/80 via-slate-900/50 to-transparent) so white text is readable.

students_studying.description: Students studying in a classroom. Use in the 'Oferta Académica' or 'Recursos' sections.

abstract_background.description: Abstract blue and white blurred background. Use for secondary section backgrounds (like Contact or CMS login).

media.logo_guidelines: Instead of a generic image placeholder, use a composition of a Lucide Icon (e.g., GraduationCap, text-blue-700) and text ('Colegio Romega') with 'Outfit' font for the brand logo. NEVER use via.placeholder.com.

testing_and_accessibility.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text overlaid on images or colored backgrounds meets APCA/WCAG AA contrast standards. Use text-shadow if necessary.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the public website with a Hero Banner, History (Misión/Visión), Oferta Académica, Noticias, Recursos, and Contacto sections.
Implement a secure hybrid CMS dashboard for admin users to manage news, resources, and view contact messages.
Apply the styling guidelines strictly: Outfit for headings, Manrope for body, and a blue/white/slate color palette.
For the CMS, build a sidebar layout. Use Shadcn components for tables and forms.
The Contact form must connect to a hybrid approach (saving to DB and showing a toast notification representing an email sent).
Replace 'Uso de marcadores de posición' requested by the user with actual images provided in 'media.image_urls' or Lucide icons, as placeholders are strictly forbidden.
Ensure the public navigation header is sticky and uses the 'Crystal Glassmorphism' technique.
